entries.value: The original FX layers 'Left Hand' and 'Right Hand' were safely identified and will be removed only from the built avatar.
The hand layers were not removed because the avatar does not use a custom regular FX Animator Controller.
The hand layers were not removed because an exact 'Left Hand' and 'Right Hand' pair was not found in the original FX controller.
The hand layers were not removed because duplicate 'Left Hand' or 'Right Hand' layer names were found.
The hand layers were not removed because one of them is the 0th Animator layer.
The hand layers were not removed because they use or are referenced by Unity Synced Layers.
The hand layers were not removed because they could not be verified as GestureLeft and GestureRight layers.
The hand layers were not removed because the original FX layer mapping changed during the NDMF build.
No VRC Avatar Descriptor was found in the parent hierarchy. Place this component under a valid avatar.
This avatar has multiple active SimpleMultiGesture components. The build will fail.
Warnings do not prevent the build.
Legacy Animation Clips cannot be used by an Animator.
The binding path was not found: {0}
The target component was not found: {0} ({1})
Setup was skipped because no parent VRC Avatar Descriptor was found: {0}
Setup was skipped because this avatar already has SimpleMultiGesture: {0}
Multiple active SimpleMultiGesture components were found. Only one is allowed per avatar.
The FX layer uses an AnimatorOverrideController. SimpleMultiGesture supports only a regular AnimatorController.
